Title: Product title (hover for full)
Drops: Count of sales rank drops (30 days)
Offers: Competing used offers and trend. ↓ Fewer (good). ↑ More (bad). Flat →.
1yr Avg: Average sale price over past year.
Age: Time since last price change. ⇧ Increased (red), ⇩ Decreased (green), ⇨ Unchanged (orange).
Margin: Profit as percentage of list price.
Action: Click to buy or apply for deal.
Min. Profit Filter: Shows deals with profit ≥ this amount.
Max. Sales Rank Filter: Shows deals with rank ≤ value. Lower = better sales.
Min. Deal Trust Filter: Minimum reliability of inferred sales data.
